---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new seam, assertion kind, or integration
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The seam or gap**
Which handoff or failure mode is not yet expressible? What slips through today?

**Proposed contract**
Sketch the assertion(s) you would want to write, ideally in the existing YAML
shape.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to catch this, and why a SeamProof check is the right place.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or prior art.
